mapper.sql: A.CONTRACT_IDX, A.CONSTRUCTION_IDX, B.name as constructionName, A.CONTRACT_TYPE, A.CONTRACT_NO, A.SITE_NAME, A.COMPANY_NAME, A.MODEL_NAME, A.SUPPLY_DEADLINE, A.DAILY_FEE, A.REQ_TRADE_NAME, A.REQ_ADDRESS, A.REQ_BUSINESS_NO, A.REQ_TEL, A.REQ_REPRESENTATIVE, A.SITE_MANAGER, A.STATUS, date_format(A.CREATED_AT, '%Y-%m-%d') as createdAt, date_format(A.SIGNED_AT, '%Y-%m-%d') as signedAt, A.isDel
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_CONTRACT (CONSTRUCTION_IDX, CONTRACT_TYPE, CONTRACT_NO, SITE_NAME, COMPANY_NAME, MODEL_NAME, SUPPLY_DEADLINE, DAILY_FEE, REQ_TRADE_NAME, REQ_ADDRESS, REQ_BUSINESS_NO, REQ_TEL, REQ_REPRESENTATIVE, SITE_MANAGER, STATUS, CREATED_AT, isDel) VALUES (#{constructionIdx}, #{contractType}, #{contractNo}, #{siteName}, #{companyName}, #{modelName}, #{supplyDeadline}, #{dailyFee}, #{reqTradeName}, #{reqAddress}, #{reqBusinessNo}, #{reqTel}, #{reqRepresentative}, #{siteManager}, 'DRAFT', NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT FROM TB_CONTRACT A LEFT JOIN TB_CONSTRUCTION B ON A.CONSTRUCTION_IDX = B.id WHERE A.CONTRACT_IDX = #{contractIdx} AND A.isDel = 0
SELECT , A.BUYER_SIGNATURE, A.CONTRACT_PDF FROM TB_CONTRACT A LEFT JOIN TB_CONSTRUCTION B ON A.CONSTRUCTION_IDX = B.id WHERE A.CONTRACT_IDX = #{contractIdx}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_CONTRACT SET CONTRACT_PDF = #{contractPdf, jdbcType=BLOB} WHERE CONTRACT_IDX = #{contractIdx}

UPDATE TB_CONTRACT SET CONTRACT_TYPE = #{contractType}, CONTRACT_NO = #{contractNo}, SITE_NAME = #{siteName}, COMPANY_NAME = #{companyName}, MODEL_NAME = #{modelName}, SUPPLY_DEADLINE = #{supplyDeadline}, DAILY_FEE = #{dailyFee}, REQ_TRADE_NAME = #{reqTradeName}, REQ_ADDRESS = #{reqAddress}, REQ_BUSINESS_NO = #{reqBusinessNo}, REQ_TEL = #{reqTel}, REQ_REPRESENTATIVE = #{reqRepresentative}, SITE_MANAGER = #{siteManager} WHERE CONTRACT_IDX = #{contractIdx}
UPDATE TB_CONTRACT SET isDel = 1 WHERE CONTRACT_IDX = #{contractIdx}
mapper.select: SELECT name, location, conManager FROM TB_CONSTRUCTION WHERE id = #{constructionIdx}

SELECT FROM TB_CONTRACT A LEFT JOIN TB_CONSTRUCTION B ON A.CONSTRUCTION_IDX = B.id WHERE A.isDel = 0 AND A.CONSTRUCTION_IDX = #{constructionIdx} AND A.STATUS = 'DRAFT' ORDER BY A.CONTRACT_IDX DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM TB_CONTRACT A LEFT JOIN TB_CONSTRUCTION B ON A.CONSTRUCTION_IDX = B.id WHERE A.isDel = 0 AND A.CONSTRUCTION_IDX = #{constructionIdx} ORDER BY A.CONTRACT_IDX DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_CONTRACT_CLAUSE_CONFIRM (CONTRACT_IDX, CLAUSE_IDX, CONFIRMED_AT) VALUES (#{contractIdx}, #{clauseIdx}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_CONTRACT SET STATUS = 'DRAFT', SIGNED_AT = NULL, BUYER_SIGNATURE = NULL, CONTRACT_PDF = NULL WHERE CONTRACT_IDX = #{contractIdx} AND isDel = 0
UPDATE TB_CONTRACT SET BUYER_SIGNATURE = #{buyerSignature}, SITE_MANAGER = #{siteManager}, STATUS = 'SIGNED', SIGNED_AT = NOW() WHERE CONTRACT_IDX = #{contractIdx}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_CONTRACT WHERE CONTRACT_NO LIKE #{datePrefix} AND isDel = 0

SELECT G.groupName, C.name AS constructionName, C.location AS locationName, A.CONTRACT_NO AS contractNo FROM TB_CONTRACT A LEFT JOIN TB_CONSTRUCTION C ON A.CONSTRUCTION_IDX = C.id LEFT JOIN TB_GROUP G ON C.groupIdx = G.idx WHERE A.CONTRACT_IDX = #{contractIdx}
